name: Thorben Schreyer
why-me-motivation: I am motivated to turn ideas into growing projects, drive teams forward through innovation and new technologies, and create meaningful solutions that continuously evolve.
skill-skills: As a Frontend Developer, I create modern and responsive web applications with a strong focus on clean code and user-friendly design. Through various projects, I have gained experience with different frontend technologies and continuously expanded my skills. I enjoy learning new technologies and adapt quickly to new challenges.
reference-1: "JOIN stands out with its clear user management and well-designed ticket system. The application feels professional and practical."
reference-2: "One of the best boss fights I have played so far. The final battle against the chicken was challenging and exceptionally well implemented."
reference-3: "The ordering app offers an intuitive user experience and delivers a realistic ordering process that closely resembles well-known delivery services."
contact-read-pp: I have read the Privacy Policy and agree to the processing of my data as described.
work-together:
Let's work together.

As a Frontend Developer, I am always interested in exciting career opportunities. If you are looking for a motivated software developer, I would be happy to hear from you. With my technical expertise, enthusiasm for modern web technologies, and continuous desire to grow professionally, I am confident that I can make a valuable contribution to your team.
project-burgerhouse-about: A food ordering web application featuring a shopping cart, product selection, and order overview functionality.
project-burgerhouse-technologies:
HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and
Responsive Design.
project-burgerhouse-learnd: I learned how to build dynamic user interfaces and implement complex user interactions using JavaScript.
project-burgerhouse-group: Working in a team improved my ability to collaborate on a product and implement constructive feedback effectively.
project-pollo-about: Pollo Loco is a browser-based jump-and-run game featuring animations, enemies, and interactive gameplay elements.
project-pollo-technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Canvas API, and Object-Oriented Programming.
project-pollo-learnd: I deepened my understanding of object-oriented programming, game mechanics, and performance optimization.
project-pollo-group: Team collaboration helped me divide tasks efficiently and develop creative solutions for technical challenges together.
project-join-about: Join is a Kanban-based project management tool for organizing tasks, teams, and workflows.
project-join-technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Firebase, REST APIs, and Responsive Design.
project-join-learned: I learned how to structure complex applications, work with databases, and design user-friendly interfaces.
project-join-group: Collaborating in a team strengthened my communication skills and showed me the importance of clear coordination and version control.
ongoing-projekt:
Memory Game
Development of a responsive memory game using TypeScript and SCSS. The project focuses on strengthening core programming concepts, application logic, and modern styling techniques while creating an engaging user experience.
